description: The 'HR_LEGACY_REPORTING' PL/SQL package in the HR schema contains critical SQL injection vulnerabilities in its dynamic SQL execution. Secure this package by refactoring 'SEARCH_EMPLOYEES' to use bind variables for the name pattern filter and 'RANK_DEPARTMENTS' to use DBMS_ASSERT or a logical whitelist for the sort column. Compile the secured package in the database and export the fixed package body code to /home/ga/Desktop/secure_reporting.sql. Connection: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123.
